children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: A documented vessel may not be titled by a State or required to display numbers under chapter 123 of this title, and any certificate of title issued by a State for a documented vessel shall be surrendered as provided by regulations prescribed by the Secretary.

children.heading: .—Vessels Covered by Preferred Mortgage
children.label: b .—Vessels Covered by Preferred Mortgage
children.text: The Secretary may approve the surrender under subsection (a) of a certificate of title for a vessel covered by a preferred mortgage under only if the mortgagee consents.section 31322(d) of this title
